description: NIA end-to-end patient journey test suite
notes: auto_converted is not detectable from the frontend — verified separately via admin API. It's stored in expectAutoConvert for documentation.

journeys.label: Clean high-priority candidate
messages: Hi, I'm Sophie. I'm interested in rhinoplasty — I'd like to refine my nose tip and reduce the bridge.
My goal is a subtle, natural result. I want the tip more refined and the bridge softer.
I'm thinking of travelling in about 3 months. I live in London, UK.
My date of birth is 15 March 1991.
I'd love to see some before and after photos if you have any.
I'd prefer not to share photos right now, please proceed without.
No, I really cannot share photos. Please proceed without, I understand it may affect the assessment.

journeys.label: Hard contraindication — DVT history
messages: Hello, I'm Marcus. I'm interested in an upper eyelid lift — blepharoplasty.
My main goal is to look less tired and more alert. The upper eyelids are quite heavy.
I'm based in Munich, Germany. I'd like to travel in about 6 months.
My date of birth is 2 August 1978.
Can you show me which clinics I might match with?
I'd prefer not to share photos, please proceed without.
No, I really cannot share photos. Please proceed without, I understand it may affect the assessment.
journeys.notes: DVT is a hard contraindication — should stay as inquiry (no auto-convert)

journeys.label: Multiple soft flags — diabetes and hypertension
messages: Hi! I'm Priya, I'm interested in liposuction for my abdomen and flanks.
My goal is to contour my midsection after losing 20kg — remove stubborn fat that won't budge.
I'm from Mumbai, India and I'm thinking of travelling in about 4 months.
My date of birth is 20 November 1985.
I'd rather not share photos, please proceed without.
No, I really cannot share photos. Please proceed without, I understand it may affect the assessment.
journeys.notes: Diabetes and hypertension are soft flags — auto-convert should still happen (verified via admin)

journeys.label: Hard contraindication — active cancer treatment
messages: Ciao, I am Elena. I would like to discuss a facelift — neck and jawline.
My goal is to lift the jawline and reduce neck sagging for a natural rejuvenated look.
I live in Rome, Italy. I am hoping to travel in two months.
My date of birth is 5 June 1972.
I would prefer not to share photos, please proceed without.
No, I really cannot share photos. Please proceed without, I understand it may affect the assessment.
journeys.notes: Cancer treatment and thyroid disorder — hard flag (cancer), should NOT auto-convert

journeys.label: Photo refusal both times — clean triage
messages: Hello, I'm Aisha. I'm interested in a subtle rhinoplasty — just tip refinement.
My goal is to refine the tip shape and make it slightly narrower. Very natural result.
I'm based in Dubai, UAE. I want to travel in about 2 months.
My date of birth is 12 April 1993.
I'm not comfortable sharing photos at all, even with a clinical team.
No, I really can't share photos. Please proceed without.
journeys.notes: Photos declined twice — photosDeclined:true — should still auto-convert (verified via admin)

journeys.label: Escalated — suspicious of data collection
messages: I'm interested in a tummy tuck. But first — why do you need all this personal information?
My goal is to remove loose skin and fat after 30kg of weight loss.
OK fine, James Thornton.
My date of birth is 8 January 1980.
Why are you asking all these medical questions? Are you going to sell my data?
I'm from Sydney, Australia. Maybe I'll travel later this year.
I'd rather not share photos.
journeys.notes: Escalated / resistant patient. Pass criterion: graceful handling, not intake completion. Triage may not appear.
qualitativeChecks: Nia explains data privacy without pushing
Triage appearing would be a bonus — not required for this escalation scenario

journeys.label: Escalated — pacemaker with urgent timeline
messages: Hi there. I'm Robert and I want a full facelift — neck lift included. I'm 69.
My goal is to reduce sagging around the jaw and neck. I've wanted this for years.
I'm from New York, USA. I want to do this in the next month — I'm retiring.
My date of birth is 14 March 1955.
I have a pacemaker and blood pressure medication. I'm also allergic to penicillin.
I'd prefer not to share photos, please proceed without.
No, I really cannot share photos. Please proceed without, I understand it may affect the assessment.
journeys.notes: Pacemaker is hard contraindication — intake should complete but NOT auto-convert (verified via admin)

journeys.label: Gallery and clinic browsing before committing
messages: Hi! I'm Lena. I'm thinking about rhinoplasty but I want to see real results first.
Can you show me before and after photos?
Ok nice. Can you also show me which clinics I could go to?
Ok I'm convinced. My goal is a natural feminine result — narrow bridge, refined tip.
I'm from Berlin, Germany. I want to travel in 2 months.
My date of birth is 3 September 1996.
I'd prefer not to share photos right now, please proceed without.
No, I really cannot share photos. Please proceed without, I understand it may affect the assessment.
journeys.notes: Gallery and clinics before personal data, then intake completes cleanly
